pundit.name: Clint Dempsey
pundit.take:
**Rafe livin' like he just won the lottery, but Devin's comin' like a ghost pepper in your fajitas.**

Lemme tell ya, Rafe's sittin' pretty at the top with 9 points, ridin' that Germany wave like they're payin' his rent, but the kid's luck's 'bout to run out. Devin's hot on his heels, only one point back, and he's got Spain and the USA puttin' in work like they're tryin' to win him free wings for a year. Meanwhile, Gayden, aka The Backpass Assassin, is playin' like he's got more backward gears than forward, sittin' on 7 points and tryin' to make Japan and Ivory Coast do the heavy liftin' when it's clear they need GPS to find the goal. Bubba G, man, Gunner's out here with a one-man show featuring France, probably thinkin' his other picks were just for decoration. And then we got Mustard Boy Zach, hangin' out at the bottom with 6 points, draftin' Saudi Arabia like he thought they'd turn oil into goals—this ain't NASCAR, bud! So Rafe better watch his back, 'cause Ghost Pepper Devin's comin' in hot, and the rest of these chumps better pick up the pace or they'll be watchin' the final from the couch with a cold one.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy's Ghana Set to Dazzle Against Panama
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach unsure if Ghana's national dish is actually mustard-based.

pundit_takes.headline: Backpass Assassin Aims for Clean Sheet Against Croatia
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gayden hopes to prove not all his picks are flukes.

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G's Confidence Skyrockets as Portugal Faces DR Congo
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gunner bets big on his Tier 4 underdog to surprise.

pundit_takes.headline: Teen Phenom 'The Noisemaker' Tops Standings with Unrivaled Strategy
pundit_takes.subtitle: Rafe leads despite believing FIFA is a new video game.

rome_analytics_quotes: Rafe leads the league, but Devin's hot on his heels like a heat-seeking missile.
Rafe's Tier-1 Germany anchors him like a luxury yacht in a kiddie pool.
Rafe's got Devin's number, 6-0 differential — it's a one-man demolition derby.
The sim called Devin's biggest day; it's a rare win for digital prophecy.
